prompts: The character slowly turns their head toward the glowing misty path, eyes widening with curiosity. Camera gently pushes in toward the character's face. The molecular vines in the air drift and curl softly. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character peers through the magnifying glass as the mTOR dial slowly rotates downward. DNA helices around the cell pulse and glow brighter in rhythmic waves. Camera orbits slowly around the cell interior. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character slumps slightly deeper, head drooping with exhaustion. The mTOR gear above spins faster, throwing off small sparks. Camera pulls back slowly to reveal the full overwhelming feast table. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character raises their arms gently as the autophagy mandala rotates slowly outward with a warm golden pulse. The ambient glow brightens softly across the whole scene. Camera tilts upward slightly, revealing the full mandala. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character places the last vegetable onto the plate with a satisfied nod. The circled calendar day glows briefly with a warm amber pulse. Camera slowly pushes in toward the character and plate. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character waves slowly and warmly toward the camera with a gentle smile. Fireflies drift upward and outward around them. Camera zooms out slowly to reveal the full glowing forest path. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.
